name: Penguin Solutions, Inc.
summary: Penguin Solutions, Inc. is an end-to-end technology company providing computing, memory, and LED solutions. The company designs, builds, deploys, and manages high-performance, high-availability enterprise solutions across three segments: Advanced Computing (via Penguin Computing), Integrated Memory (via SMART Modular Technologies), and Optimized LED (via Cree LED). It also offers fault-tolerant computing through Stratus Technologies. With over two decades of experience, Penguin Solutions serves customers requiring complex AI, enterprise, and government computing infrastructure.

products.name: Penguin Computing
products.description: High-performance computing and AI infrastructure solutions for enterprise and government customers.

products.name: SMART Modular Technologies
products.description: Integrated memory products and modules for enterprise applications.

products.name: Cree LED
products.description: LED solutions for various commercial and industrial applications.

products.name: Stratus Technologies
products.description: Fault-tolerant, high-availability computing platforms for enterprise environments.

products.name: Penguin Edge
products.description: Edge computing products, being wound down with manufacturing and sales being discontinued.
